overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a dystopian shantytown beneath a massive neon-lit structure at night. The character walks from a cluttered interior shelter through makeshift tents and debris, eventually emerging onto a city sidewalk with palm trees and sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered interior shelter beneath elevated structure

events.description: character stands up from the red couch and begins walking

agents.ego_description: character rises from the couch and surveys the immediate surroundings before walking

entered.detail: worn red couch with a teddy bear and cans sitting on it
white concrete block used as a makeshift table
massive rusted steel beams with bright pink neon lights
makeshift tent constructed from green tarps and wooden poles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a character sitting on a worn red velvet couch inside a cluttered makeshift shelter. The area is dimly lit by pink neon lights from the massive metal framework overhead. The character stands up and begins walking through the debris-strewn dirt ground, passing concrete blocks and tarp shelters.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the encampment passing tents and debris piles

notable_agents.action: person sitting near a tent in the background

entered.detail: food vendor stall with large orange illuminated umbrella
blue metal shipping container converted into shelter
red and white striped concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the shantytown beneath the massive neon-lit structure. The ground remains dirt covered with scattered debris and cardboard. Tents and makeshift shelters line the path, with a food stall visible in the distance. The pink neon lights cast a surreal glow over the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from shantytown to city street

events.description: exits the covered shantytown into the open street environment
first vehicles become visible on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking toward the city street, passing food vendors and entering the open urban area with palm trees

notable_agents.action: vendor standing under the orange umbrella
car with headlights on driving along the road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows in the distance
tall street lamps casting white light

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered shantytown into an open area under the night sky. The environment transitions from dirt to concrete sidewalk. Palm trees become visible along the street, and city skyscrapers rise in the background. A food vendor stands under an orange umbrella as vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with active street traffic

events.description: multiple vehicles pass by on the road with headlights illuminating the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing other pedestrians and following a large man in a blue tank top

notable_agents.action: large man in blue tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in orange jacket walking opposite direction

entered.detail: red and white striped metal crowd control barriers
two-story residential building with orange exterior lighting
overhead electrical wires crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a busy street with moderate traffic. Palm trees line the right side of the path, and metal barriers separate the walkway from a construction or encampment area on the left. Other pedestrians walk along the path, and the city buildings continue in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with distant mountain view

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk away from the neon structure, approaching distant figures

notable_agents.action: group of people walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark silhouette of mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking down the sidewalk with the large neon structure now far behind. The street becomes more residential with fewer barriers and obstacles. Palm trees line the right side, and mountains are visible in the distant background. Sparse traffic continues to pass on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit shantytown into the open, sprawling expanse of a futuristic city at night. It begins inside a cluttered shelter where a character rises from a red velvet couch, moving through a dimly lit interior cast in pink neon light. As the character advances, the scene expands into a debris-strewn encampment of tarp shelters and food stalls beneath a massive metal framework, with the surreal pink glow persisting across the dirt ground. The environment then shifts as the character exits the covered area, transitioning from dirt to a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and skyscrapers under an open night sky. Finally, the camera follows the character further along the city street, passing a food vendor and moderate traffic as the neon structure recedes into the distance and mountains appear on the horizon.
